title: Rhaponticoides amplifolia
taxonomy: Rhaponticoides amplifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the tribe Cardueae. Rhaponticoides amplifolia is native to the Cape Provinces of South Africa. The exact classification of this species is Rhaponticoides amplifolia, which is sometimes placed in the genus Centaurea. Further classification may vary depending on the source.
